creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
The ImageMagick port tries to build version 5.1.1 which apparently
doesn't exist on any mirrors or the original site.  The latest version
seems to be 5.2.1 on the official site.

Fix: 

Update to current version or install new version by hand instead.
How-To-Repeat: 
	
cd /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick
make fetch
